headlines.description: — Derrick White scored a season-high 33 points and tied a career-high with nine 3-pointers to help the Boston Celtics pull away in the second half for a 129-116 win over the Miami Heat on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Derrick White scores season-high 33, hits nine 3s as Celtics pull away from Heat 129-116

headlines.description: — Tyrese Maxey scored 30 points, VJ Edgecombe had 23 and the Philadelphia 76ers became just the second visiting team to win at Madison Square Garden this season, beating the New York Knicks 116-107 on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Maxey, Edgecombe help the 76ers hand the Knicks their second home loss of the season

headlines.description: — Matas Buzelis and Nikola Vucevic each scored 24 points as the Chicago Bulls pulled away in the fourth quarter for a 136-125 victory over the reeling Cleveland Cavaliers on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Buzelis and Vucevic score 24 apiece to lead Bulls to 136-125 victory over short-handed Cavaliers
